description: Crafted from 92% cotton and 8% spandex fabric, this high coverage brassiere from enamor is designed with a bottom panel that provides extra lift with a cut that offers exemplary comfort making it perfect for the confident you. Ideal for support through the day. Made of breathable stretch cotton/spandex fabric for enhanced comfort Bottom panel that provides extra lift, perfect shaping and style Beautifully cushioned straps with perfect stretch Printed label for abrasion-free comfort Wash care Hand wash below 40 degrees Do not bleach or iron Drip dry in shade Owing to the intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
